mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(loginID) FROM tb_userinfo WHERE user_type = 'I'
SELECT COUNT(loginID) FROM tb_userinfo WHERE user_type = 'S'

SELECT ts.course_id AS courseId, ts.period AS period, ts.title AS title, IFNULL(c.title, '임시 과정') AS subject, -- 강의명이 없어도 나오게 처리 DATE_FORMAT(ts.date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS examDate FROM test_schedule ts LEFT JOIN course c ON ts.course_id = c.course_id WHERE YEAR(ts.date) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(ts.date) = MONTH(NOW()) -- AND ts.date >= CURDATE() -- 지나간 시험도 이번 달이면 보이게 주석 처리 -- AND ts.status = 1 -- 활성화 상태인 것만 표시 ORDER BY ts.date ASC -- LIMIT 1 -- 개수 제한

SELECT cc.class_name AS roomNumber, CONCAT(ct.start_time, ' ~ ', ct.end_time) AS timeSlot, c.title AS subject, DATE_FORMAT(c.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(c.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate, c.course_id AS courseId, c.title AS courseName FROM course c INNER JOIN course_class cc ON c.class_id = cc.class_id INNER JOIN course_time ct ON c.time_code = ct.time_code WHERE CURDATE() BETWEEN c.start_date AND c.end_date AND c.cos_sta_code = 1 AND c.course_isDeleted = 0 ORDER BY cc.class_name, ct.start_time LIMIT 10
